findings.title: Pay button accepts double click within request window
preconditions: The user has a populated cart and a valid stored payment method.
The user is on the page /checkout.
steps: (ui-user) Click the button labeled "Pay" within 100 ms
(observer) Open the table "payments" on database "siae-checkout-prod" and report the row count for the user's order_id
findings.expected: Exactly one row is inserted in the table "payments" for the order_id.
findings.actual: Two rows are inserted in the table "payments" for the same order_id; the second row is reconciled only by a nightly job.
findings.suggested_fix_direction: Disable the button after the first click until the response settles, and add a server-side dedupe key on (user_id, order_id, minute).

findings.title: Signup form clears on browser back navigation
preconditions: Public access to the application; the user is not yet authenticated.
Browser history is enabled (standard Chrome / Firefox / Safari).
steps: (ui-user) Press the browser back arrow once
(observer) Inspect the page /signup and report the value of the field "email"
findings.expected: The field "email" still contains "mario.rossi@example.com" after the back navigation.
findings.actual: The field "email" is empty; the user must re-enter the address.
findings.suggested_fix_direction: Persist the form state in sessionStorage keyed by route, or wire the form to a route-level loader that rehydrates state on popstate.
